Interface IRandomFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control random function arguments.

[Guid("E3758340-C297-4816-9EB9-0476CF78CD36")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRandomFunctionArguments2 : IRandomFunctionArguments

One random distribution parameter value.
